item.title: [Daily] Skills.sh snapshot (2026-03-04)
item.description: Daily snapshot. Providers: skills.sh All Time skills: 41430 Trending skills: 16348 Hot skills: 2339 Top All Time: find-skills (394937) Top Trending: azure-ai (15501) Top Hot: sleek-design-mobile-apps (583)

item.title: [All Time] New entry (#43): systematic-debugging
item.description: New entry in All Time leaderboard. Rank: #43 Installs: 21615 Source: obra/superpowers Description: Use when encountering any bug, test failure, or unexpected behavior, before proposing fixes

item.title: [All Time] New entry (#44): docx
item.description: New entry in All Time leaderboard. Rank: #44 Installs: 21005 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Comprehensive document creation, editing, and analysis with support for tracked changes, comments, formatting preservation, and text extraction. When Claude needs to work with professional documents (.docx files) for: (1) Creating new documents, (2) Modifying or editing content, (3) Working with tracked changes, (4) Adding comments, or any other document tasks

item.title: [All Time] New entry (#45): xlsx
item.description: New entry in All Time leaderboard. Rank: #45 Installs: 19919 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Comprehensive spreadsheet creation, editing, and analysis with support for formulas, formatting, data analysis, and visualization. When Claude needs to work with spreadsheets (.xlsx, .xlsm, .csv, .tsv, etc) for: (1) Creating new spreadsheets with formulas and formatting, (2) Reading or analyzing data, (3) Modify existing spreadsheets while preserving formulas, (4) Data analysis and visualization in spreadsheets, or (5) Recalculating formulas

item.title: [All Time] New entry (#46): agent-email-cli
item.description: New entry in All Time leaderboard. Rank: #46 Installs: 19844 Source: zaddy6/agent-email-skill Description: Operate the agent-email CLI to create disposable inboxes, poll for new mail, retrieve full message details, and manage local mailbox profiles. Use when the user needs terminal-based email inbox access for LLM or agent automation workflows.

item.title: [All Time] New entry (#47): writing-plans
item.description: New entry in All Time leaderboard. Rank: #47 Installs: 19780 Source: obra/superpowers Description: Use when you have a spec or requirements for a multi-step task, before touching code

item.title: [All Time] New entry (#48): simple-brainstorm
item.description: New entry in All Time leaderboard. Rank: #48 Installs: 19306 Source: roin-orca/skills Description: Invoke before any creative or architectural work — feature design, component creation, or behavioral changes. A streamlined brainstorming process optimized for fast, focused decision-making.

item.title: [All Time] New entry (#49): marketing-psychology
item.description: New entry in All Time leaderboard. Rank: #49 Installs: 18446 Source: coreyhaines31/marketingskills Description: When the user wants to apply psychological principles, mental models, or behavioral science to marketing. Also use when the user mentions 'psychology,' 'mental models,' 'cognitive bias,' 'persuasion,' 'behavioral science,' 'why people buy,' 'decision-making,' or 'consumer behavior.' This skill provides 70+ mental models organized for marketing application.

item.title: [All Time] New entry (#50): better-auth-best-practices
item.description: New entry in All Time leaderboard. Rank: #50 Installs: 18274 Source: better-auth/skills Description: Skill for integrating Better Auth - the comprehensive TypeScript authentication framework.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#14): sigma
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #14 Installs: 22 Source: sanyuan0704/sanyuan-skills Description: Personalized 1-on-1 AI tutor using Bloom's 2-Sigma mastery learning. Guides users through any topic with Socratic questioning, adaptive pacing, and rich visual output (HTML dashboards, Excalidraw concept maps, generated images). Use when user wants to learn something, study a topic, understand a concept, requests tutoring, says 'teach me', 'I want to learn', 'explain X to me step by step', 'help me understand', or invokes /sigma. Triggers on: learn, study, teach, tutor, understand, master, explain step by step.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#15): using-superpowers
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #15 Installs: 52 Source: obra/superpowers Description: Use when starting any conversation - establishes how to find and use skills, requiring Skill tool invocation before ANY response including clarifying questions

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#16): java-springboot
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #16 Installs: 41 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Get best practices for developing applications with Spring Boot.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#17): memory-merger
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #17 Installs: 39 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Merges mature lessons from a domain memory file into its instruction file. Syntax: `/memory-merger >domain [scope]` where scope is `global` (default), `user`, `workspace`, or `ws`.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#18): sql-optimization
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #18 Installs: 38 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Universal SQL performance optimization assistant for comprehensive query tuning, indexing strategies, and database performance analysis across all SQL databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, Oracle). Provides execution plan analysis, pagination optimization, batch operations, and performance monitoring guidance.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#19): create-readme
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #19 Installs: 38 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Create a README.md file for the project

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#20): readme-blueprint-generator
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #20 Installs: 38 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Intelligent README.md generation prompt that analyzes project documentation structure and creates comprehensive repository documentation. Scans .github/copilot directory files and copilot-instructions.md to extract project information, technology stack, architecture, development workflow, coding standards, and testing approaches while generating well-structured markdown documentation with proper formatting, cross-references, and developer-focused content.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#21): baoyu-image-gen
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #21 Installs: 30 Source: jimliu/baoyu-skills Description: AI image generation with OpenAI and Google APIs. Supports text-to-image, reference images, aspect ratios, and parallel generation (recommended 4 concurrent subagents). Use when user asks to generate, create, or draw images.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#22): code-review-expert
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #22 Installs: 20 Source: sanyuan0704/sanyuan-skills Description: Expert code review of current git changes with a senior engineer lens. Detects SOLID violations, security risks, and proposes actionable improvements.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#23): remotion-best-practices
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #23 Installs: 82 Source: remotion-dev/skills Description: Best practices for Remotion - Video creation in React

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#24): test-driven-development
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #24 Installs: 52 Source: obra/superpowers Description: Use when implementing any feature or bugfix, before writing implementation code

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#27): playwright-explore-website
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #27 Installs: 38 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Website exploration for testing using Playwright MCP

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#29): multi-stage-dockerfile
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #29 Installs: 37 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Create optimized multi-stage Dockerfiles for any language or framework

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#3): bmad-gds
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #3 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: AI-driven Game Development Studio using BMAD methodology. Routes game projects through Pre-production, Design, Architecture, Production, and Game Testing phases with 6 specialized agents. Supports Unity, Unreal Engine, Godot, and custom engines.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#30): webapp-testing
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #30 Installs: 37 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Toolkit for interacting with and testing local web applications using Playwright. Supports verifying frontend functionality, debugging UI behavior, capturing browser screenshots, and viewing browser logs.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#31): meeting-minutes
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #31 Installs: 37 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Generate concise, actionable meeting minutes for internal meetings. Includes metadata, attendees, agenda, decisions, action items (owner + due date), and follow-up steps.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#32): review-and-refactor
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #32 Installs: 37 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Review and refactor code in your project according to defined instructions

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#33): php-mcp-server-generator
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #33 Installs: 37 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Generate a complete PHP Model Context Protocol server project with tools, resources, prompts, and tests using the official PHP SDK

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#34): pytest-coverage
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #34 Installs: 37 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Run pytest tests with coverage, discover lines missing coverage, and increase coverage to 100%.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#38): add-educational-comments
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #38 Installs: 36 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Add educational comments to the file specified, or prompt asking for file to comment if one is not provided.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#39): gen-specs-as-issues
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #39 Installs: 36 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: This workflow guides you through a systematic approach to identify missing features, prioritize them, and create detailed specifications for implementation.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#4): bmad-idea
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #4 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Creative Intelligence Suite for AI-driven ideation, design thinking, innovation strategy, problem-solving, and storytelling. 5 named specialist agents with distinct methodologies — no setup required, all workflows available immediately.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#40): image-manipulation-image-magick
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #40 Installs: 36 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Process and manipulate images using ImageMagick. Supports resizing, format conversion, batch processing, and retrieving image metadata. Use when working with images, creating thumbnails, resizing wallpapers, or performing batch image operations.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#42): create-agentsmd
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #42 Installs: 36 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Prompt for generating an AGENTS.md file for a repository

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#43): dotnet-best-practices
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #43 Installs: 36 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Ensure .NET/C# code meets best practices for the solution/project.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#44): polyglot-test-agent
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #44 Installs: 36 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Generates comprehensive, workable unit tests for any programming language using a multi-agent pipeline. Use when asked to generate tests, write unit tests, improve test coverage, add test coverage, create test files, or test a codebase. Supports C#, TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Go, Rust, Java, and more. Orchestrates research, planning, and implementation phases to produce tests that compile, pass, and follow project conventions.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#45): create-github-issues-for-unmet-specification-requirements
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #45 Installs: 36 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Create GitHub Issues for unimplemented requirements from specification files using feature_request.yml template.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#46): openapi-to-application-code
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #46 Installs: 36 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Generate a complete, production-ready application from an OpenAPI specification

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#47): centos-linux-triage
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #47 Installs: 36 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Triage and resolve CentOS issues using RHEL-compatible tooling, SELinux-aware practices, and firewalld.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#48): architecture-blueprint-generator
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #48 Installs: 36 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Comprehensive project architecture blueprint generator that analyzes codebases to create detailed architectural documentation. Automatically detects technology stacks and architectural patterns, generates visual diagrams, documents implementation patterns, and provides extensible blueprints for maintaining architectural consistency and guiding new development.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#49): create-specification
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #49 Installs: 36 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Create a new specification file for the solution, optimized for Generative AI consumption.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#50): write-coding-standards-from-file
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #50 Installs: 36 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Write a coding standards document for a project using the coding styles from the file(s) and/or folder(s) passed as arguments in the prompt.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#7): skill-creator
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #7 Installs: 128 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Claude's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations.

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#34): planner
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #34 Installs: 1412 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Create comprehensive, phased implementation plans with sprints and atomic tasks. Use when user says: "make a plan", "create a plan", "plan this out", "plan the implementation", "help me plan", "design a plan", "draft a plan", "write a plan", "outline the steps", "break this down into tasks", "what's the plan for", or any similar planning request. Also triggers on explicit "/planner" or "/plan" commands.

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#35): brainstorming
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #35 Installs: 1412 Source: obra/superpowers Description: You MUST use this before any creative work - creating features, building components, adding functionality, or modifying behavior. Explores user intent, requirements and design before implementation.

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#36): openai-docs-skill
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #36 Installs: 1410 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Query the OpenAI developer documentation via the OpenAI Docs MCP server using CLI (curl/jq). Use whenever a task involves the OpenAI API (Responses, Chat Completions, Realtime, etc.), OpenAI SDKs, ChatGPT Apps SDK, Codex, MCP integrations, endpoint schemas, parameters, limits, or migrations and you need up-to-date official guidance.

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#37): parallel-task
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #37 Installs: 1407 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Execute plan files by launching multiple parallel subagents to complete tasks simultaneously. Triggers on explicit "/parallel-task" commands.

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#38): read-github
item.description:
New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #38 Installs: 1404 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Read and search GitHub repository documentation via gitmcp.io MCP service.
**WHEN TO USE:** - User provides a GitHub URL - User mentions a specific repo in owner/repo format - User asks "what does this repo do?", "read the docs for X repo", or similar - User wants to search code or docs within a repo

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#39): swarm-planner
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #39 Installs: 1402 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: [EXPLICIT INVOCATION ONLY] Creates dependency-aware implementation plans optimized for parallel multi-agent execution.

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#40): markdown-url
item.description:
New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #40 Installs: 1401 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Route any website you need to visit through markdown.new by prefixing the URL.
**WHEN TO USE:** - You would normally open a website link to read content (docs, blog posts, changelogs, GitHub issues, etc.) - You need a cleaner, Markdown-friendly view for copying notes or summarizing

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#41): tdd-test-writer
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #41 Installs: 1401 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Writes failing tests first for test-driven development and hands off a strict implementation contract that requires agents to make those tests pass without weakening the tests. Use when users ask for test-first workflows, RED/GREEN cycles, or behavior-gating tasks with automated tests.

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#42): agent browser
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #42 Installs: 1398 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: A fast Rust-based headless browser automation CLI with Node.js fallback that enables AI agents to navigate, click, type, and snapshot pages via structured commands.
